result.stdout:
Usage: nugetize [options] [msbuild args]
  -?, -h, --help             Display this help.
  -b, --bl, --binlog         Generate binlog.
  -v, --verbose              Render MSBuild output.
  -i, --items[=VALUE]        MSBuild items file path containing full package
                               contents metadata.
      --version              Render tool version and copyright information.
  [msbuild args]             Examples:
                             - Automatically restore: -r
                             - Set normal MSBuild verbosity: -v:n
                             - Set minimal MSBuild verbosity: -v:m
                             - Build configuration: -p:Configuration=Release
